ques: Find daytime only parking nearest to Madison Square Garden. Summarize what people are saying about it.
answer: The nearest daytime-only (non‑24h) parking to Madison Square Garden is the Quik Park / Icon – QUIK PARK garage at 384 8th Ave (also listed as 253 W 29th St), ~3 blocks south; it opens ~7:00 and closes in the evening (Icon listing 22:00; Quik Park midnight) while surrounding garages are 24h. Sentiment is positive: the Quik Park operation rates 4.7★ from 20 reviews and the overall Icon – QUIK PARK facility 4.0★ (written review text wasn't viewable in Maps' signed-out limited view).
